message:
refactor(_signal_mod): Use h.I32(), h.c() factories

Replace 50 constant generator functions with factory pattern:
- h.I32() for signal numbers (SIGHUP, SIGINT, SIGKILL, etc.)
- h.I32() for signal handling constants (SIG_DFL, SIG_IGN)
- h.I32() for timer/mask constants (ITIMER_*, SIG_BLOCK/UNBLOCK)
- h.c() for struct/array returns (getitimer, pthread_sigmask, etc.)

Reduces file from 343 to 100 lines (-243 lines).
